name: Horseradish Mashed Potatoes with Caramelized Onions
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 lbs russet potatoes, peeled, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1/4 cup butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions; sauté until deep golden, about 30 minutes.
3. Add vinegar and thyme. Reduce heat to low; sauté for 4 minutes.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Cook potatoes in a large pot of boiling salted water until very tender (about 20 minutes).
6. Drain the potatoes.
7. Return the potatoes to the same pot; mash until smooth.
8. Add the remaining 2 tablespoons butter, horseradish, and milk; stir to blend.
9. Thin with additional milk if necessary. Season with salt and pepper.
10. Transfer potatoes to a serving dish.
11. Spoon onion mixture atop potatoes.
(You can prepare this ahead of time. Cover and refrigerate. To reheat, warm in a 350°F oven for about 30 minutes.)
Serve hot.
